zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet於1519年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Arthur Plantagenet39歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Grey49歲。她於1538年2月15日與John Basset在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年9月7日在英國英格蘭戴文默頓享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文武波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet于1519年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Arthur Plantagenet39岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Grey49岁。她于1538年2月15日与John Basset在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年9月7日在英国英格兰戴文默頓享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文武波利。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Baroness,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Barsnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from a farmstead so named in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, possibly from a compound of the Old Norse personal name Baldrekr + nes ‘point, headland’.

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet was born in 1519, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Arthur Plantagenet, was 39 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Grey, was 49. She married John Basset on 15 February 1538, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 September 1568, in Merton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Umberleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet est née en 1519, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Arthur Plantagenet, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Grey, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé John Basset le 15 février 1538, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1568, à Merton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Umberleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet 1519 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arthur Plantagenet 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Grey 49. Sie hat am 15. Februar 1538 in Devon, England, United Kingdom John Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. September 1568 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Merton, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Umberleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet è nata il nel 1519 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Arthur Plantagenet, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Grey, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato John Basset il 15 febbraio 1538, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 settembre 1568, nel Merton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Umberleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenetが1519年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Arthur Plantagenetは39歳，母Lady Elizabeth Greyは49歳であった。1538年2月15日にイギリスイギリスデボンでJohn Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年9月7日にイギリスイギリスデボンマートンで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンウンバーレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet(이)가 1519년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arthur Plantagenet(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Grey(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1538년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 John Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 9월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 머턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet nasceu em 1519, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Arthur Plantagenet, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com John Basset em 15 de fevereiro de 1538, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1568, em Merton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet родилась в 1519 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Arthur Plantagenet было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Grey, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Basset 15 февраля 1538 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 сентября 1568 г. в местности миртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности умбирлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet nació en 1519, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Arthur Plantagenet, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tenía 49 años. Se casó con John Basset el 15 de febrero de 1538, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1568, en Merton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
